nasb.text: Moreover, their wealth will become plunder And their houses desolate; Yes, they will build houses but not inhabit them, And plant vineyards but not drink their wine.”

esv.text: Their goods shall be plundered, and their houses laid waste. Though they build houses, they shall not inhabit them; though they plant vineyards, they shall not drink wine from them.”

cnv.text: 他們的財寶必成為掠物， 他們的房屋必變為廢墟。 他們建造房屋，卻不得住在其中； 他們栽植葡萄園，卻不得喝所出的酒。”

ccb.text: 他们的财物必遭抢掠， 家园必沦为废墟。 他们建造房屋，却不能住在里面； 栽种葡萄园，却喝不到葡萄酒。
